description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist geometric design. The exterior features a combination of smooth white and gray surfaces, with a prominent balcony on the upper floor and large rectangular windows. The front facade includes a recessed entryway, partially sheltered by the balcony above, and a garage door integrated into the lower level. The house is surrounded by a low perimeter wall, creating a private courtyard or driveway area. The overall structure is boxy and angular, with clean lines and a focus on functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a balcony, featuring a minimalist white and gray exterior and a private courtyard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the recessed entryway, balcony, large windows, and garage door, with the courtyard visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, flat facade, minimal window openings, and the extent of the perimeter wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional windows, the courtyard area, and the boxy structure of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with minimal window openings and a clear view of the flat roof and courtyard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entryway beneath a balcony, integrated with a garage door, minimal decorative elements, and a sheltered approach
